reason: Verified that the agent successfully uses the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting the necessary permissions.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the Super Agent interface with sidebar listing agents.
Step 2: Found the "QA-20260416-024303-56f5" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent page opened successfully, showing agent name and idle status.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" (shown with blue dot in header and sidebar).
Step 4: Typed and sent the message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working".

Step 5: GitHub Account Access Request card appeared — Card displayed asking to allow access to GitHub account. GitHub account was already selected in the checkbox. Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant permission.
Step 6: API Request Review card appeared — Second permission card appeared asking to allow GET /user request. Clicked "Allow Once" to authorize the API call.
Step 7: Waited for agent response — Agent worked for 36 seconds total, completing the GitHub profile fetch.
Step 8: Verified response includes GitHub username — Final response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Agent status returned to "idle". Screenshot taken showing complete conversation.
